Bus Timings

20B Bus Timetable Al Warsan 3 to Al Nahda 1 Terminus

November 6, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Dubai’s public transportation system provides seamless connectivity for residents and visitors alike. This article delves into the details of Bus 20B, covering its operational schedule, route highlights, and travel tips to make your journey efficient and hassle-free.

Operational Details

Bus 20B operates frequently throughout the day, ensuring convenient options for travelers. Below is the schedule for departures from Al Warsan 3 and Al Nahda 1 Terminus.

From Al Warsan 3 From Al Nahda 1, Terminus
05:03 06:51
05:35 07:23
06:10 07:58
07:05 08:53
07:30 09:18
07:55 09:43
08:25 10:13
08:55 10:43
09:25 11:13
10:02 11:50
10:43 12:31
11:12 13:00
11:33 13:21
12:02 13:50
12:30 14:18
13:00 14:48
13:34 15:22
14:13 16:01
14:44 16:32
15:08 16:56
15:40 17:28
16:18 18:06
16:46 18:34
17:22 19:10
18:00 19:48
18:30 20:18
18:59 20:47
19:36 21:24
20:17 22:05
20:46 22:34
21:30 23:18
22:02 23:50
22:33 00:21
22:59 00:47
23:23 01:11
23:45 01:33
00:10 01:58

Bus 20B Timetable

You can find the full schedule on the official RTA website or by visiting this link 20B Bus Timings.

Ticket Pricing: Traveling on the 20B Bus is simple and hassle-free with the Nol Card, Dubai’s unified payment system for public transportation. The base fare for a single trip within one zone starts at AED 3.

Route Overview

The Bus 20B provides a comprehensive route connecting notable residential, commercial, and service locations in Dubai. Below is a detailed list of its key stops:

  1. Al Warsan 3, RTA Staff Accommodation A starting point for many commuters, catering to RTA staff and nearby residents.

  2. Emirates Transport Driving Institute A hub for driving lessons and licensing services.

  3. Dubai Municipality Nursery A key site supporting Dubai’s environmental and landscaping efforts.

  4. Dubai Nursery An important location for horticultural activities.

  5. Dubai Birds and Pets Market A lively marketplace for pet lovers and enthusiasts.

  6. Flydubai HQ The operational headquarters of Dubai’s low-cost airline.

  7. DEWA Staff Accommodation Housing for Dubai Electricity and Water Authority employees.

  8. DEWA Logistics A central logistics facility for DEWA services.

  9. International City, Morocco A residential cluster with Moroccan-inspired architecture.

  10. International City, China 3 Part of the bustling China-themed district in International City.

  11. International City, China 2 Another vibrant section of the Chinese cluster.

  12. Dragon Mart A massive retail hub for Chinese goods and diverse shopping options.

  13. Post Office Providing essential postal services to the area.

  14. Rivera Dreams Apartments A residential complex offering modern living spaces.

  15. CBD Buildings Central Business District towers catering to professionals and businesses.

  16. Civil Defence A facility ensuring public safety and emergency services.

  17. International City, Greece A residential area reflecting Greek architectural styles.

  18. Manama Road, 4 A strategic stop along a major roadway.

  19. Rashidiya Bus Station · 3 A key transit hub connecting to various parts of the city.

  20. Police Station Ensuring security and public order in the area.

  21. Emarat Petrol Station A convenient refueling point for commuters.

  22. Rashidiya A vibrant neighborhood with residential and commercial spaces.

  23. Beirut Road A major thoroughfare connecting key areas of Dubai.

  24. Emirates Engineering A state-of-the-art facility for aviation engineering.

  25. Dubai Police Private Kindergarten A school catering to the children of Dubai Police staff.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Maria Qibtiya School An educational institution serving the local community.

  2. Airport Terminal 2, Departure A gateway for outbound travelers.

  3. Airport Terminal 2, Arrival Welcoming passengers arriving in Dubai.

  4. Street 16A A residential area with easy access to nearby amenities.

  5. Al Twar 1, Street 16C A peaceful residential community.

  6. DM Accommodation Housing for Dubai Municipality staff.

  7. Ministry of Information A government office providing public services.

  8. Sheikh Rashid Colony A residential neighborhood with historical significance.

  9. Emirates Driving Institute A training center for aspiring drivers.

  10. Ministry of Human Resources & Emiratisation A governmental facility supporting workforce services.

  11. Dubai Women’s College A premier institution for higher education.

  12. Sheikh Rashid Al Maktoum Pakistan School An educational institution for the Pakistani community.

  13. NMC Hospital A leading healthcare facility providing quality medical services.

  14. Al Nahda 1 Terminus The endpoint of the route, serving a vibrant residential district.

The route ensures seamless connectivity to vital residential hubs, commercial centers, and service locations, catering to the diverse needs of daily commuters and visitors alike.

Accessibility and Services

The Bus 20B is equipped with features ensuring inclusivity and comfort:

  • Wheelchair Accessibility: Ramps and designated spaces for passengers with disabilities.

  • Priority Seating: Reserved seating for elderly and special-needs passengers.
  • Audio-Visual Announcements: For real-time updates and stop notifications.

These features aim to accommodate the needs of all passengers, ensuring a comfortable journey.

Nearby Attractions and Landmarks

Passengers traveling on Bus 20B can easily access notable destinations:

  1. Dragon Mart A renowned shopping destination for wholesale products.

  2. Flydubai HQ A key operational hub for the budget airline.

  3. Dubai Birds and Pets Market A unique destination for pet lovers.

  4. Airport Terminal 2 Offering connectivity for international and domestic travelers.

Journey Experience

The 20B bus from Al Warsan 3 to Al Nahda 1 Terminus offers a long yet engaging ride through Dubai’s vibrant neighborhoods.

It continues through Rashidiya and Beirut Road, showcasing Dubai’s dynamic cityscape, before reaching Al Nahda 1 Terminus, home to diverse eateries and the tranquil Al Nahda Pond Park. Along the way, passengers can glimpse Dubai’s mix of modern infrastructure and cultural diversity, making the trip a window into the city’s unique character. Whether commuting or exploring, the ride is a convenient and enriching experience.

Travel Tips for Bus 20B

  • Plan Your Trip: Familiarize yourself with the schedule to minimize waiting time.

  • Nol Card Ready: Ensure sufficient balance on your Nol Card for a smooth journey.
  • Avoid Peak Hours: Travel during non-peak times for a more relaxed ride.
  • Stay Updated: Use the RTA app for real-time bus tracking and updates.

The Bus 20B route is a reliable and efficient option for travelers navigating between Al Warsan 3 and Al Nahda 1 Terminus. With its frequent services, inclusive features, and access to key landmarks, it serves as an essential link within Dubai’s public transportation network.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: November 6, 2025.
